arts.ttl: Man City 'set apart' in transfer battle for £38.7m defender amid Real Madrid, Premier League competition
arts.sum: Manchester City will reportedly face competition from a fellow Premier League Big Six club in the race to sign Lazio defender Mario Gila this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United 'plotting £38m swoop' for 'Argentine Phil Foden' as key Ruben Amorim advantage emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly consider making a move for a 17-year-old Argentine starlet who has been likened to Manchester City's Phil Foden.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Man City let 'exceptional' talent go ahead of Aston Villa reunion
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers will come up against his former club Manchester City on Tuesday night as he looks to plot their downfall with Aston Villa in a game that will be crucial for Champions League qualification

arts.ttl: Manchester United scouted Atalanta duo Ederson and Matteo Retegui
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with a move for Atalanta’s Ederson in recent weeks and they have now scouted the Brazilian and his teammate Matteo Retegui. TuttoAtalanta have reported that…

arts.ttl: Man City 'set for October trial' vs Premier League over latest rule change challenge
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly set to take the Premier League to trial over Associated Party Transaction rules.

arts.ttl: Manchester City target Désiré Doué yet to begin extension talks with PSG
arts.sum: Désiré Doué’s (19) performances for Paris Saint-Germain in 2025 have caught the eyes of Manchester City, as per Sacha Tavolieri. The Cityzens’ interest in the France international has pushed PSG to begin contract extension…

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Aston Villa: Visitors looking to end 62-year streak in pivotal Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be looking to end a 62-year streak when they square off against Manchester City in their Premier League fixture at the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Man City get unexpected transfer boost from UEFA to cement status above Real Madrid and Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City accountants will be buoyed by a fresh £4m boost from UEFA for having more players than any other club in European in international competition.

arts.ttl: Grealish and Doku back, De Bruyne out - Man City predicted line-up vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Aston Villa in a must-win Premier League clash that could define their Champions League qualification chances.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa winger is looking for immediate exit from the club due to Unai Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa have had an impressive season as Unai Emery’s team reached the quarterfinal of the Champions League. They are still fighting in the league to qualify for the Champions League next but not everything is well at the club.
